project_name: ON Soluções Energéticas - Solar Management System

design_philosophy.visual_style: Dark Sidebar Dashboard with Clean White Data Surfaces
key_principles: Yellow (#FFD600) is for Action and Energy - use it for CTAs, active states, and primary data.
Black (#1A1A1A) is for Structure - sidebar, headers, strong text.
White/Light Grey is for Content - cards, tables, reading areas.
Data Density: High. Use compact tables and clear hierarchy.
Language: All interface text MUST be in Brazilian Portuguese (pt-BR).

sidebar.logo_area: h-16 flex items-center px-6 border-b border-neutral-800

main_content.card_style: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-neutral-100 p-6 transition-all hover:shadow-md

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFD600] hover:bg-[#EAB308] text-[#1A1A1A] font-semibold px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-neutral-200 text-neutral-700 hover:bg-neutral-50 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-neutral-100 text-neutral-600 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors

inputs.default: border-neutral-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FFD600] focus:border-transparent rounded-lg text-sm

kpi.wrapper: flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white rounded-xl p-5 border border-neutral-100 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden
kpi.icon_wrapper: p-3 rounded-lg bg-neutral-50 text-[#FFD600] w-fit mb-4
kpi.label: text-sm text-neutral-500 font-medium uppercase tracking-wide
kpi.trend_positive: text-emerald-600 text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1 mt-2
kpi.trend_negative: text-red-600 text-xs font-medium flex items-center gap-1 mt-2

tables.header: bg-neutral-50 text-neutral-500 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3 text-left
tables.status_badge: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

logo.note: Use 'sem fundo' (transparent) version. Ensure it contrasts with the dark sidebar. If the text is black and invisible on the sidebar, use a white container or the 'fundo preto' version: https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_powerplant-analytics/artifacts/jjj04u17_logo%20on%20fundo%20preto.png

login.layout: Split screen: Left 40% Form (White), Right 60% Image (Solar Field)
login.elements: Logo top-left, 'Bem-vindo de volta' heading, Email/Password inputs, 'Entrar' primary button.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar fixed left. Top bar sticky. Main content scrollable.

plants_list.card_content: Image thumbnail, Name, Capacity (kWp), Current Output, Status Badge.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI components immediately (Button, Input, Card, Table, Dialog, DropdownMenu).
2. Configure Tailwind theme with the provided colors (#FFD600 primary).
3. Implement the LayoutWrapper component with the dark sidebar (#1A1A1A).
4. Use Recharts for all data visualization. Style them to match the theme (minimalist, no grid lines, custom tooltips).
5. Ensure ALL text is in Portuguese (pt-BR). Use 'R$' for currency formatting.
6. Create a 'KPICard' component that accepts title, value, icon, and trend.
7. Create a 'StatusBadge' component for consistent plant status display.
8. For the login page, use the provided Unsplash image on the right side with a dark overlay if needed for text contrast.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use flat, bold colors or subtle mesh gradients if absolutely necessary.
Spacing is luxury. Use p-6 or p-8 for card padding.
Border radius: rounded-xl for containers, rounded-lg for inner elements.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should scale down slightly on click (active:scale-95). Cards should lift on hover (-translate-y-1).
Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-md for the top navigation bar to let content scroll underneath smoothly.
